popularStory.headline: Summary of Life
popularStory.description: French Noble. The Count of Anjou and Duke of Normandy from the house Gatinais, his habit of wearing a sprig of broom plant (planta genesta in Latin) on his hat is the origin of the name "Plantagenet." …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Geoffrey Plantagenet Count of Anjou於1113年8月24日出生在法國安喬時，他的父親Foulques V d'Anjou Roi de Jérusalem24歲，母親Erembourg du Maine Comtesse d'Anjou23歲。他於1127年6月5日與Matilda of England Holy Roman Empress在法國薩特勒 曼斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1151年9月7日在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易薩特a奧-度-洛易享年38歲，埋葬在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易薩特勒 曼斯。

nameMeanings.name: Geoffrey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic (Frankish and Lombard) origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was in regular use among the counts of Anjou, ancestors of the English royal house of Plantagenet, who were descended from Geoffrey Plantagenet, Count of Anjou ( 1113–51 ). It was a particularly popular name in England and France in the later Middle Ages; notable bearers in England include the poet Geoffrey Chaucer ( c.1340–1400 ) and in Wales the chronicler Geoffrey of Monmouth ( d. 1155 ). The original form and meaning of the name is disputed. According to one theory, it is merely a variant of Godfrey ; others derive the first part from the Germanic word gawia ‘territory’, walah ‘stranger’, or gisil ‘pledge’. Medieval forms can be found to support all these theories, and it is possible that several names have fallen together, or that the name was subjected to reanalysis by folk etymology at an early date.

en.lifeSummary: When Geoffrey Plantagenet Count of Anjou was born on 24 August 1113, in Anjou, France, his father, Foulques V d'Anjou Roi de Jérusalem, was 24 and his mother, Erembourg du Maine Comtesse d'Anjou, was 23. He married Matilda of England Holy Roman Empress on 5 June 1127, in Le Mans, Sarthe, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 7 September 1151, in Château-du-Loir, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, France, at the age of 38, and was buried in Le Mans, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Geoffrey Plantagenet Count of Anjou est né le 24 août 1113, à Anjou, France, son père, Foulques V d'Anjou Roi de Jérusalem, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Erembourg du Maine Comtesse d'Anjou, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Matilda of England Holy Roman Empress le 5 juin 1127, à Le Mans, Sarthe, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé le 7 septembre 1151, à Château-du-Loir, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, France, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterré à Le Mans, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Geoffrey Plantagenet Count of Anjou am 24. August 1113 in Anjou, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Foulques V d'Anjou Roi de Jérusalem 24 und seine Mutter Erembourg du Maine Comtesse d'Anjou 23. Er hat am 5. Juni 1127 in Le Mans, Sarthe, Frankreich Matilda of England Holy Roman Empress geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb am 7. September 1151 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Château-du-Loir, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich und wurde in Le Mans, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey Plantagenet Count of Anjou è nato il il 24 agosto 1113 nel Anjou, Francia, il suo padre, Foulques V d'Anjou Roi de Jérusalem, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Erembourg du Maine Comtesse d'Anjou, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Matilda of England Holy Roman Empress il 5 giugno 1127, nel Le Mans, Sarthe, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 7 settembre 1151, nel Château-du-Loir, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Francia, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolto a Le Mans, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Francia.

ko.lifeSummary: Geoffrey Plantagenet Count of Anjou(이)가 1113년 8월 24일 프랑스 앤조우에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Foulques V d'Anjou Roi de Jérusalem(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Erembourg du Maine Comtesse d'Anjou(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1127년 6월 5일 프랑스 사르테 일 먼스에서 Matilda of England Holy Roman Empress(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1151년 9월 7일 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 사르테 cha테오-드-로이르에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 사르테 일 먼스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Geoffrey Plantagenet Count of Anjou nasceu em 24 de agosto de 1113, em Anjou, França, seu pai, Foulques V d'Anjou Roi de Jérusalem, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Erembourg du Maine Comtesse d'Anjou, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Matilda of England Holy Roman Empress em 5 de junho de 1127, em Le Mans, Sarthe, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 7 de setembro de 1151, em Château-du-Loir, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, França, com 38 anos, e foi sepultado em Le Mans, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Geoffrey Plantagenet Count of Anjou родился 24 августа 1113 г. в местности анджоу, Франция, его отцу по имени Foulques V d'Anjou Roi de Jérusalem было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Erembourg du Maine Comtesse d'Anjou, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda of England Holy Roman Empress 5 июня 1127 г. в местности л манс, сарт, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 7 сентября 1151 г. в местности чaто-ду-лоир, сарт, пеис де ла лоир, Франция в возрасте 38 лет и был похоронен в местности л манс, сарт, пеис де ла лоир, Франция.

Se casó con Matilda of England Holy Roman Empress el 5 de junio de 1127, en Le Mans, Sarthe, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 7 de septiembre de 1151, en Château-du-Loir, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Francia, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultado en Le Mans, Sarthe, Pays de la Loire, Francia.
